overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a blue cape outfit exploring a dimly lit industrial facility. The character walks through a storage area with metal shutters and debris, approaches yellow cabinets at the back, then turns and walks back through a corridor populated with other facility workers.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage room with metal shutters and debris

events.description: character walks past the stationary NPC in white lab coat near the storage containers
character reaches the yellow storage cabinets at the back wall of the room

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial storage area toward the back wall with yellow cabinets

notable_agents.action: scientist in white lab coat standing still near dark storage containers

entered.detail: large red cylindrical structural pillar with industrial piping
corrugated metal shutter wall with debris piled at the base
scattered trash and debris accumulated on the concrete floor
bright yellow industrial storage cabinets against the back wall
stacked dark metal barrels near the yellow cabinets

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit industrial storage room with a prominent red pillar on the left and corrugated metal shutters ahead. A scientist in a white lab coat stands near containers on the right as the character moves toward bright yellow cabinets at the back of the room, passing debris scattered on the concrete floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with passing workers and steam vents

events.description: character turns around at the yellow cabinets to head back toward the corridor entrance
scene becomes more populated with multiple NPCs walking through the industrial corridor

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back through the industrial corridor, passing other facility workers

notable_agents.action: worker in dark clothing walking toward the character through the corridor
person in yellow jacket walking in the background near the red pillar

entered.detail: extended corridor with metal railings and industrial equipment visible in the distance
white steam or smoke rising from vents on the left side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: After reaching the back wall, the character turns and walks back through the facility corridor. The red pillar now appears on the right side as the character passes other workers walking through the steamy industrial hallway, with distant machinery visible down the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial storage area that transitions into a bustling facility corridor. It begins with the character walking past a red pillar and a scientist in a white lab coat, moving across a concrete floor scattered with debris toward bright yellow cabinets. As the character reaches the back wall, the perspective shifts in a smooth turn to head back the way they came. The scene then opens into a steamy industrial hallway where the red pillar now appears on the right, passing other workers and revealing distant machinery further down the corridor.
